About.title: About Me
About.description: Information Systems Engineering Student, I have developed several personal and academic projects that have allowed me to apply and reinforce my knowledge in both frontend and backend development.

PROJECTS.title: Projects
PROJECTS.subtitle: Some of the projects I've worked on

projects.title: Store Management Platform
projects.description: Administrative system featuring RBAC roles, inventory management, advanced CRUD with pagination, and modular architecture in NestJS.

projects.title: Full Stack E-commerce
projects.description: E-commerce platform featuring a dynamic shopping cart and seamless payment integration via Mercado Pago API.

projects.title: Operating System Simulator
projects.description: Custom implementation of Kernel, CPU, and Filesystem modules in C/Go. Includes process scheduling, memory management, and communication protocols.

projects.title: Enterprise Appointment System (In Progress)
projects.description: Scalable SaaS-style architecture featuring an API Gateway and microservices communicating via RabbitMQ for appointment and notification management.
